# terrible_playbook (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run against.
- `playbook` (String) Path to the playbook YAML file.

### Optional

- `extra_vars` (String) Extra variables passed to the playbook/role.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, failures do not raise a Terraform error.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags.
- `timeout` (Number) Override execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether any task reported a change.
- `id` (String) Unique resource ID.
- `result` (String) Full raw JSON result.
